blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,273 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 39".
